chapter_title.en: Chapter 2 – Merits of the bearers (memorisers) of the Quran

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/489)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/489)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حَمَلَةُ الْقُرْآنِ عُرَفَاءُ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ وَ الْمُجْتَهِدُونَ قُوَّادُ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةَ وَ الرُّسُلُ سَادَةُ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةَ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The bearers of the Quran are the understanding ones of the Paradise, and the strivers are the guides of the people of the Paradise, and the Rasools<sup>as</sup> would be the chiefs of the people of the Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ali has narrated from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘The carriers of the Holy Quran will be the most knowledgeable people of paradise, the assiduously working people will be the leaders in paradise and the messengers will be the masters of the people of paradise.’”
